name: The Blood of the Bull
inspire:
When you use a daemonforge dice in the Attack roll or Save roll for a friendly fighter, after that Attack, Inspire that fighter.

After an Attack made by a friendly Chaos Duardin ({icon:chaos-duardin}), if the target was adjacent to a friendly Grisk, Inspire that Grisk.

reactions.name: Enhance Arsenal
reactions.trigger: Immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack made by a friendly Chaos Duardin ({icon:chaos-duardin})
reactions.rulesText: you can use 1 daemonforge dice in the Attack roll. If you do so, that weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

reactions.name: Reinforce Armoury
reactions.trigger: Immediately after a friendly Chaos Duardin ({icon:chaos-duardin}) is picked to be the target of an Attack
reactions.rulesText: you can use 1 daemonforge dice in the Save roll. If you do so, that fighter has +1 Save for that Attack.

abilities.name: Empowered by Spite
abilities.flavorText: As Zuldrakka and her warriors kill, burn and despoil, their daemon-crafted arms and armour grow ever more powerful.
abilities.rulesText:
You start the game with 1 daemonforge dice.

In your Power step, if a friendly fighter with no Stagger tokens Delves a treasure token, gain 1 daemonforge dice. All daemonforge dice are lost at the end of each battle round.

abilities.name: Infernal Conflagration
abilities.flavorText: Tokkor's flamehurler spits sentient fire that sticks to flesh and disintegrates the soul.
abilities.rulesText: A friendly Tokkor's ranged weapons (excluding Upgrades) have Grievous ({icon:grievous}) if the target is adjacent.

abilities.name: Hobgrot Cunning
abilities.flavorText: Grisk might be a conniving, murderous back-stabber, but he has his uses...
abilities.rulesText: Rolls of both {icon:fury} and {icon:dodge} are successes in an Attack roll for a friendly Chaos Duardin ({icon:chaos-duardin}) while the target is adjacent to a friendly Grisk.
